It searched the article and found the correct one, developed the contents after reading the paper, created contents for 12 slides, including searching images from internet, asked for suggestions to make edits, which I declined and asked it to go ahead and generated slides in a PowerPoint format. Everything happened inside my phone in five to six minutes. Since it's my own article, I know it got most of the things right.
